content:
Architectural lighting design software: digital planning of light environment

Lighting design is a key element of the indoor and outdoor environment of the building. From indoor lighting to building facade lighting, from landscape lighting to emergency lighting, lighting design software helps designers accurately calculate lighting effectiveness and optimize light environment design. This article will comprehensively evaluate mainstream architectural lighting design software and help lighting designers master the digitalization tools for light environment planning.

Lighting design software Corevalue

Lighting design software plays key functions in architectural design:

  • Lighting calculation: accurate calculation of illuminance and brightness distribution
  • Lamp selection: lamp selection and layout design
  • effectiv eness simulation: three-dimensional visualization of lighting effectiveness
  • Energy consumption analysis: lighting energy consumption prediction and optimization
  • Specification verification: automatic verification of lighting specifications

In-depth Review: Mainstream lighting design software

DIALux: Free professional tool for lighting design

DIALux is a professional software for lighting design, Free and widely used by lighting designers around the world.

Core Features:

  • Indoor and outdoor lighting calculations
  • Rich lamp database
  • Three-dimensional visualization of lighting effectiveness
  • Lighting energy consumption analysis
  • Lighting report generation
  • Free to use

Free professional:

Coreadvantages of DIALux is Free professional. The software is free to use but has professional functions. It is a standard tool for lighting designers.

Lamp data:

DIALux has a rich lighting database. Major lighting manufacturers provide product data and design data. Designers can accurately calculate the effectiveness of real lamps.

AGI32: A professional platform for lighting calculations

AGI32 is a professional software for lighting calculations, focusing on accurate lighting simulation.

Core Features:

  • Accurate lighting calculation engine
  • Complex scenarios lighting simulation
  • Road lighting analysis
  • Sports venue lighting design
  • Lighting visualization

Calculation accuracy:

Coreadvantages of AGI32 is calculation accuracy. The calculation engine of the software is precise and suitable for those who need precision Professional projects for lighting simulation.

Professional scenarios:

AGI32Supported professional lighting scenarios such as road lighting and sports venues, covering a wide range of functions.

Relux: a comprehensive platform for lighting design

Relux is a comprehensive software platform for lighting design, integrating lighting calculation and visualization.

Core Features:

  • Indoor and outdoor lighting calculations
  • Visualization of lighting effectiveness
  • Lamp database
  • Combined analysis of daylight and lighting
  • BIM model import

Comprehensive analysis:

< p>Relux's advantages are comprehensive analysis. The software integrates daylight and lighting analysis, and designers can comprehensively consider natural light and artificial lighting.

BIM integration:

Relux can import BIM models and integrate lighting design into BIM workflow.

< h2>Lighting design software development trend forecast

Intelligent lighting design

AI will assist lighting design. AI can automatically generate lighting plans according to space conditions and optimize lamp layout. Lighting design efficiency will be improved.

Dynamic lighting simulation

Dynamic lighting simulation will be even more improved. Designers can simulate the effectiveness of lighting control systems and experience different lighting scenarios.

Comprehensive analysis of light environment

Comprehensive analysis of light environment

h3>

The lighting design software will comprehensively analyze the integration light environment. Comprehensive consideration of natural light, artificial lighting, glare control and other factors.

BIM lighting integration

The lighting design will deeply integrate BIM. Lighting models Models are integrated into BIM projects, and lighting design and architectural design are seamlessly connected.

Purchase Suggestions

When choosing lighting design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Calculation accuracy: AGI32 is required for accurate lighting calculations
  • Budget consideration Quantity: Free tool DIALux is suitable for budget Limited projects
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects require BIM integration functions
  • Lamp brand: Evaluate whether the lighting database contains commonly used brands
  • Learning investment: Evaluate team learning curve and training time

Lighting design software is a digitalization tool for light environment planning. Choose appropriate lighting design software to create a comfortable and efficient lighting environment.
